2112830.name: Idle Space War
2112830.description:
About the Game:

Idle Space War is an idle simulation game set in the vast reaches of space. Players upgrade their spaceships, explore uncharted planets, and gather valuable resources along the way. Progress continues even when the game is closed, making it perfect for busy players who want to enjoy the game at their own pace. While combat elements are present, the game focuses on customization and growth, offering a relaxing yet deeply engaging experience with plenty of content to explore.

Details:

• Spaceship Upgrades: Add new modules and equipment to build your own unique spaceship. Enhance its performance to explore distant planets and unlock new adventures.

• Idle Resource Collection: Resources are automatically gathered even when you’re not playing. Simply log in periodically to collect rewards and watch your spaceship evolve.

• Planet Exploration: Visit a variety of planets and develop strategies to adapt to their unique environments. Each planet holds rare resources and hidden treasures to discover.

• Easy Controls: Simple, intuitive interface that allows even beginners to jump in and start playing right away.

Key Features:

• Immersive space experience with captivating visuals

• Extensive upgrade options to tailor gameplay to your style

• A perfect blend of idle gameplay simplicity and in-depth progression

• In-game goals and achievement systems to keep you motivated

Take your spaceship and embark on an epic journey through the vast universe, discovering uncharted planets and hidden treasures along the way!
2112830.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 印度尼西亚语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文, 韩语
